description.value:
Category: Skill

Your study of history rewards you with the following benefits:

• Increase your Intelligence score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

• You gain proficiency in the History skill.

If you are already proficient, you instead gain Mastery.

• Twice per long rest, when you take the Help action to aid another creature's check, you can make a DC 15 Intelligence (History) check.

On a success, that creature's check gains a bonus equal to your Intelligence modifier, as you share pertinent advice and historical examples.

You regain one use of this feature on a short rest.

• As an action on your turn or as a reaction to seeing a creature for the first time, select one creature you can see you can.

Make an Intelligence (History) check vs a DC (8 + Creatures level).

On a success, you become aware of this creature primary jutsu type or method of combat as you recall reading or researching about them.

You can only use this feature on a creature once per long rest.

On a failure, you cannot immediately recall anything about them.

activation.condition: When you take the Help action to aid another creature’s check
